# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  labels:
    istio-injection: enabled
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh
  annotations:
    description: "Namespace for microservices with Istio service mesh"

---
# Frontend Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    version: v1
    tier: frontend
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Frontend service with Istio sidecar proxy enabled"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: frontend-service
        version: v1
        tier: frontend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "200m"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: frontend-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: frontend
          image: myregistry/frontend-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "frontend-service"
            - name: BACKEND_API_URL
              value: "http://backend-api-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8081"
            - name: ORDER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"

---
# Frontend Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: frontend-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service

---
# Frontend Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: frontend-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: frontend-service
    tier: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: frontend-service

---
# Backend API Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with custom configuration
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    version: v1
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Backend API service with Istio sidecar proxy and custom mesh settings"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: backend-api-service
        version: v1
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "200m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "1Gi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "400m"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "5432"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/includeInboundPorts: "8081,9090"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 4
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: backend-api-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: backend-api
          image: myregistry/backend-api-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 20
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8081
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "backend-api-service"
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "postgres-db.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: ORDER_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8082"
            - name: NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-api-secrets
                  key: db-password

---
# Backend API Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service

---
# Backend API Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: backend-api-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
    tier: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
    - port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      name: grpc
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: backend-api-service

---
# Order Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled with canary version support
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service-v1
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v1
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order service v1 stable release with Istio sidecar"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v1
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "300m"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: SERVICE_VERSION
              value: "v1"
            - name: NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"

---
# Order Service v2 - Canary deployment with Istio sidecar
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service-v2
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    version: v2
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Order service v2 canary release with Istio sidecar for traffic splitting"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
      version: v2
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
        version: v2
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "150m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "300m"
        sidecar.istio.io/rewriteAppHTTPProbers: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/logLevel: "debug"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 100.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: myregistry/order-service:2.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8082
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "order-service"
            - name: SERVICE_VERSION
              value: "v2"
            - name: NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL
              value: "http://notification-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local:8083"

---
# Order Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service

---
# Order Kubernetes Service (routes to both v1 and v2)
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: order-service
    tier: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: order-service

---
# Notification Service - Istio sidecar injection enabled
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    version: v1
    tier: backend
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    description: "Notification service with Istio sidecar proxy for event-driven messaging"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
      version: v1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: notification-service
        version: v1
        tier: backend
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemory: "256Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPU: "100m"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyMemoryLimit: "512Mi"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyCPULimit: "200m"
        traffic.sidecar.istio.io/excludeOutboundPorts: "9092,6379"
        proxy.istio.io/config: |
          concurrency: 2
          holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
          tracing:
            sampling: 50.0
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: notification-service-sa
      containers:
        - name: notification-service
          image: myregistry/notification-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "400m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8083
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 5
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "notification-service"
            - name: KAFKA_BROKERS
              value: "kafka.microservices.svc.cluster.local:9092"
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              value: "redis.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: REDIS_PORT
              value: "6379"

---
# Notification Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service

---
# Notification Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: notification-service
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    tier: backend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      name: http
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: notification-service

---
# Database Migration Job - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED
# Jobs and batch processes should not have sidecars to avoid hanging after completion
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: db-migration-runner
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: db-migration-runner
    tier: utility
  annotations:
    description: "Database migration runner - Istio sidecar explicitly disabled to prevent job hang"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: db-migration-runner
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: db-migration-runner
        tier: utility
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: db-migration-sa
      containers:
        - name: db-migration
          image: myregistry/db-migration:1.0.0
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
          env:
            - name: DATABASE_HOST
              value: "postgres-db.microservices.svc.cluster.local"
            - name: DATABASE_PORT
              value: "5432"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: backend-api-secrets
                  key: db-password

---
# DB Migration Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: db-migration-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: db-migration-runner

---
# Monitoring Exporter - Istio sidecar injection DISABLED
# Internal monitoring tools that scrape metrics do not need mesh participation
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-exporter
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: metrics-exporter
    tier: monitoring
  annotations:
    description: "Metrics exporter excluded from Istio mesh to allow direct Prometheus scraping"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-exporter
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-exporter
        tier: monitoring
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "9100"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: metrics-exporter-sa
      containers:
        - name: metrics-exporter
          image: myregistry/metrics-exporter:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9100
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "50m"
              memory: "64Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "100m"
              memory: "128Mi"

---
# Metrics Exporter Service Account
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: metrics-exporter-sa
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: metrics-exporter

---
# Metrics Exporter Kubernetes Service
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-exporter
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: metrics-exporter
    tier: monitoring
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
    - port: 9100
      targetPort: 9100
      name: metrics
      protocol: TCP
  selector:
    app: metrics-exporter

---
# Istio DestinationRule for Order Service canary traffic management
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: order-service-destination
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Destination rule defining subsets for order service v1 and v2 canary deployment"
spec:
  host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 60s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
  subsets:
    - name: v1
      labels:
        version: v1
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
    - name: v2
      labels:
        version: v2
      trafficPolicy:
        connectionPool:
          http:
            maxRequestsPerConnection: 50

---
# Istio VirtualService for Order Service canary traffic splitting
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: order-service-routing
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Virtual service for order service canary routing - 90/10 traffic split"
spec:
  hosts:
    - order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
  http:
    - match:
        - headers:
            x-canary:
              exact: "true"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8082
    - route:
        - destination:
            host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v1
            port:
              number: 8082
          weight: 90
        - destination:
            host: order-service.microservices.svc.cluster.local
            subset: v2
            port:
              number: 8082
          weight: 10

---
# Istio PeerAuthentication - enforce mTLS across the namespace
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Enforce strict mTLS for all services in the microservices namespace"
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT

---
# Istio AuthorizationPolicy - restrict backend-api access
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: backend-api-access-policy
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    description: "Allow only frontend and order services to access backend-api-service"
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-api-service
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/frontend-service-sa"
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/order-service-sa"
      to:
        - operation:
            ports:
              - "8081"
              - "9090"

---
# Secrets for backend API database credentials
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: backend-api-secrets
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app: backend-api-service
type: Opaque
data:
  db-password: Y2hhbmdlLW1lLWluLXByb2R1Y3Rpb24=
